source_pr.title: plan: refactor errors
source_pr.body:
1. move all error definitions into `errors.go`
2. remove `terror.ClassOptimizerPlan`

symptoms: {"select a from t where t.a < t.a order by t11.c1", "[optimizer:1054]Unknown column 't11.c1' in 'order clause'"}, (plan/logical_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: {"select a from t where t.a < t.a order by t11.c1", "[optimizer:1054]Unknown column 't11.c1' in 'order clause'"}, (plan/logical_plan_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: {"select a from t where t.a < t.a order by t11.c1", "[optimizer:1054]Unknown column 't11.c1' in 'order clause'"}, (plan/logical_plan_test.go)

files: executor/executor_test.go, executor/prepared_test.go, plan/errors.go, plan/expression_rewriter.go, plan/logical_plan_builder.go, plan/logical_plan_test.go, plan/optimizer.go, plan/planbuilder.go, terror/terror.go, util/ranger/points.go
